info.description: Identity and access management service for the GreenLab IoT platform.
info.title: GreenLab IAM API

get.summary: List API keys for the authenticated tenant

post.summary: Authenticate a user and obtain tokens
Refresh an access token using a refresh token
Reset password using a reset token
Self-register a new account with email and password
Add a member to a workspace

delete.summary: Remove a member from a workspace

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
